Brewski

Appearance

BrewskiBrew better beer.

Free, open-source homebrewing software for recipe design, batch tracking, and everything in between.

Get Started
View on GitHub

Recipe Builder

Build recipes from a library of hundreds of hops, fermentables, yeasts, and water profiles. The stats sidebar updates in real time as you add ingredients.

Batch Tracking

Log every brew day, record gravity readings, track fermentation, and manage carbonation. Your brew history lives in one place.

Water Chemistry

Set up water profiles, dial in your mineral additions, and see how your water will affect the final beer before you brew.

Built-In Calculators

ABV, pitch rate, priming sugar, hydrometer correction, refractometer, gravity conversions, color conversions — all the math done for you.

BeerXML Support

Import recipes from Brewfather, BeerSmith, or any BeerXML-compatible tool. Export your recipes to share with friends or back them up.

Free & Open Source

Brewski is MIT-licensed and free forever. No subscription, no account required, no data sent to anyone.

Released under the MIT License.
